name: Chandni Jhumka
description: Moonlit jhumkas with hand-cut kundan petals and a gentle sway that catches candlelight. Each pair is finished over three days — filed, set, and polished by a single artisan so the symmetry feels almost breathing.
careInstructions: Store in the provided pouch. Avoid perfume directly on stones. Wipe with a soft dry cloth.

process.title: Sketch & silhouette
process.description: The bell curve is drawn freehand on butter paper — no two pairs are identical by design.

process.title: Stone setting
process.description: Kundan petals are set with lac and silver foil, then burnished until the surface glows softly.

process.title: Final polish
process.description: Hooks are tested for balance; each jhumka is weighed so both ears carry the same gentle pull.

name: Meera Choker
description: A close-fitting choker inspired by temple borders — miniature pearls strung on silk thread with a central medallion motif drawn from our logo. It sits at the collarbone like a whispered compliment.
careInstructions: Lay flat when storing. Keep away from moisture.

process.title: Pearl selection
process.description: Pearls are matched for lustre and size across forty centimetres of strand.

process.title: Medallion casting
process.description: The centre motif is cast in brass and hand-engraved before plating.

process.title: Stringing
process.description: Silk thread is waxed and knotted between each pearl for durability and drape.

name: Gulmohar Kada
description: A hinged kada with enamelled gulmohar blooms along the band — flame-tree red against warm gold. Opens with a concealed clasp so the floral story stays uninterrupted.
careInstructions: Avoid impact on enamel. Store separately to prevent scratching.

process.title: Band forming
process.description: Brass is rolled to thickness and shaped on a mandrel for wrist comfort.

process.title: Enamel work
process.description: Each petal is filled with pigment and fired twice for depth of colour.

process.title: Clasp fitting
process.description: The hidden hinge is tested for five hundred open-close cycles before approval.

name: Noor Haar
description: A long haar of graduated kundan stations linked by fine chain — light enough to wear from morning pooja to midnight dessert. Named for the glow it leaves along the neckline.
careInstructions: Store hung vertically. Detangle gently with fingers, never a brush.

process.title: Station layout
process.description: Stations are arranged on a velvet board to perfect the graduation curve.

process.title: Linking
process.description: Each station is linked with double-jump rings for security without bulk.

process.title: Quality check
process.description: The haar is draped on a bust form and inspected for symmetry under warm light.

name: Sitar Strings Bracelet
description: Fine silver wire twisted like sitar strings, capped with miniature tuning peg charms. A conversation piece for musicians and dreamers alike.
careInstructions: Polish occasionally with provided cloth. Remove before swimming.

process.title: Wire twisting
process.description: Silver wire is twisted by hand to mimic the resonance pattern of sitar strings.

process.title: Charm casting
process.description: Miniature pegs are cast and attached with soldered loops.

process.title: Sizing
process.description: Finished with an adjustable chain extender for wrist sizes 5.5–7 in.

name: Raag Brooch
description: A textile jewellery brooch — zari thread embroidered on silk with a gold-plated pin back. Designed to anchor a dupatta fold or brighten a lapel.
careInstructions: Spot clean only. Pin through sturdy fabric layers.

process.title: Silk mounting
process.description: Silk is stretched on an embroidery frame and stabilised with backing.

process.title: Zari embroidery
process.description: Motifs are stitched in running zari with a single needle over two days.

process.title: Pin assembly
process.description: A secure pin back is riveted and covered with felt to protect fabric.

name: Gajra Hair Pin
description: A silk-thread gajra wound around a gold-plated hair pin — jasmine-scented thread optional on request. For braids, buns, and the last touch before stepping out.
careInstructions: Store in a dry place. Fluff gently before wearing.

process.title: Thread winding
process.description: Silk thread is wound in tight coils to mimic fresh gajra fullness.

process.title: Pin fitting
process.description: The pin is inserted through the coil core and secured with adhesive and wire.

process.title: Scenting
process.description: Optional jasmine essence is applied sparingly to thread ends.

name: Amber Drop Studs
description: Petite gold-plated studs with amber-toned glass drops — everyday pieces that still feel considered. The post is hypoallergenic for sensitive ears.
careInstructions: Wipe after wear. Store in earring box.

process.title: Post preparation
process.description: Hypoallergenic posts are soldered to stud bases and tested for nickel content.

process.title: Drop attachment
process.description: Glass drops are linked with micro jump rings for subtle movement.

process.title: Plating
process.description: Final gold plate applied in a thin, even coat for longevity.

name: Sangam Bangle Set
description: A set of three thin silver bangles with hand-hammered texture — named for the confluence of rivers, meant to be worn stacked or shared among sisters.
careInstructions: Polish with silver cloth. Store in anti-tarnish pouch.

process.title: Bangle forming
process.description: Silver rod is shaped into three matching circumferences.

process.title: Hammer texture
process.description: Each bangle receives random hammer strikes for organic shimmer.

process.title: Set matching
process.description: Bangles are grouped by weight and tone before packaging as a set.

name: Vardaan Tikka
description: A forehead tikka with a central kundan teardrop and fine chain sides — adjustable for different parting widths. The piece that completes a bridal look without shouting.
careInstructions: Store flat. Handle chain delicately to avoid kinks.

process.title: Teardrop setting
process.description: The central kundan teardrop is set in a closed-back bezel for stability.

process.title: Chain measurement
process.description: Side chains are cut to adjustable lengths with micro clasps.

process.title: Fit testing
process.description: Tested on multiple head forms for comfortable forehead contact.
